blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
